title: Pack record
description: A resolved canonical record. 'sites' is the info archetype's frozen vocabulary for the subject-of-record (platform ADR-0045); in this dataset the subject-of-record is one pack model at one capacity. Every published value traces to a signal and thence to a source. Values we do not have are named in `gaps`, never guessed.

id.description: Deterministic per data/profiles/records.md. Equals the filename stem.

name.description: The model name as the maker writes it.

line.description: The maker's own product-family name — ONLY where the maker actually operates named lines. A model-numbering convention is not a line.

status.description: Product lifecycle, never inventory. 'Sold out' is not a status. Discontinued packs stay in the dataset — history, not embarrassment.

capacity_note.description: Carries a conflict the sources have not resolved. Do not resolve it here.

weight_g.description: Grams. Convert from the maker's units and say so in weight_note if the maker published pounds.

dimensions.description: As published, with units, e.g. '11.5"W x 18"H x 5.5"D'.

observed.description: Required. A price is a dated observation, not a property of the pack.

released.description: Year or ISO date, as sourced.

discontinued.description: Year or ISO date, as sourced.

signals.description: The signal ids this record resolves. CI-enforced to exist.

gaps.description: Named unknowns. 'We looked and did not find' — the difference between a gap and an omission is the difference between honesty and sloppiness.
